backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the game backend defining character, item, and marketplace data types and storage, with CRUD operations for characters, items, user profiles, and a marketplace, using access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three bug-fix features (stat point persistence, ability selection enablement, character class display) to their relevant frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and key changes of each frontend source file across components, hooks, data, and engine modules.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Abyss Ascendant app that mounts the React root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wires together authentication, character selection, dungeon flow, level-up modal, health regen, and all screen components using React Query and custom hooks.
frontend/src/components/AbilitySelectMod: Modal component for selecting up to three class-specific abilities, filtering out stale cross-class abilities and tracking available ability points based on character level.
frontend/src/components/CharacterCreatio: Multi-step character creation form (class selection and stat allocation) that handles creating and deleting characters, generates starter equipment, and applies class stat bonuses.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSelectS: Displays a list of existing characters with class icons/images for selection, handles loading/error states, and provides a button to create a new character.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSheet.t: Shows a character's stats, abilities, and equipment with modals for spending stat points on level-up and equipping abilities, syncing changes to the backend.
frontend/src/components/DungeonRunScreen: Runs a dungeon combat simulation, animates the combat log line-by-line, then saves the result (XP, level, HP) to the backend and triggers completion or death callbacks.
frontend/src/components/DungeonSelectScr: Lets the player choose a monster level and dungeon mode before starting a run, displaying XP/drop rate info and handling pending loot from previous runs.
frontend/src/components/HealthBar.tsx: Renders a color-coded HP bar (high/mid/low thresholds) in either compact or full size, showing current and max HP values.
Renders a tabbed inventory UI (Inventory, Stash, Equipped) for a character, allowing item selection and actions like equip, unequip, move to/from stash.
frontend/src/components/ItemTooltip.tsx: Displays a styled tooltip card for a GeneratedItem showing its rarity, type, base stats, and affixes with icons and color coding.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardScree: Shows a mock leaderboard with Softcore and Hardcore realm tabs, displaying ranked adventurers with level, class tier, XP, and status.
frontend/src/components/LevelUpModal.tsx: Modal dialog that lets a player allocate stat points (STR, DEX, INT, VIT) upon leveling up, then confirms the allocation back to the parent.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Full-screen login page with Internet Identity authentication, displaying the game logo, feature highlights, and a login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/MarketplaceScree: React component for a player marketplace with browse and sell tabs, allowing users to list inventory items for sale at a set price and buy listings from other players using mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky header navigation component with tabs for all major game screens, character info display, a compact health bar, and logout/back-to-character-select controls.
frontend/src/components/ProfessionsPlace: Static placeholder screen for the Professions feature, displaying a 'Coming Soon' message with icons and descriptions for Smithing, Alchemy, Tinkering, and Gathering.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that forces new users to choose a validated adventurer username before proceeding, submitting it via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ShrinesPlacehold: Static placeholder screen for the Shrines of Power feature, showing a 'Coming Soon' message with animated icons and descriptions for four shrine types.
frontend/src/components/XPBar.tsx: Displays a character's XP progress toward the next level as a progress bar, supporting both compact and full display modes.
frontend/src/data/abilities.ts: Defines TypeScript types and a static ABILITIES array containing all class abilities (Warrior, Rogue, Mage) with stats like damage multipliers, scaling stats, cooldowns, and icons.
frontend/src/data/monsters.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and data pools for monster generation, including base monster templates, prefix/suffix modifier lists, and stat structures used to compose named monsters with varied stats.
frontend/src/engine/combatEngine.ts: Implements the turn-based combat simulation engine, calculating player and monster damage, XP rewards, loot drops, and returning a full combat result log given player stats and dungeon level.
frontend/src/engine/lootGenerator.ts: Generates randomized loot items with rarity-weighted affixes, stat ranges, and level scaling for weapons, armor, and trinkets dropped by monsters.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useHealthRegen.ts: React hook that regenerates player HP at a fixed rate outside of combat, syncing to the backend periodically or when HP reaches maximum.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state, AuthClient creation, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalCharacter.ts: Custom React hook that manages local character state by combining backend Character data with localStorage-persisted data (HP, inventory, equipped items, abilities). Provides utilities to build, load, and save LocalCharacter objects including starter equipment initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks and mutations for all backend actor interactions including fetching characters, creating/deleting characters, updating stats, spending stat points, submitting dungeon results, and marketplace operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, imports Google Fonts (Cinzel, Inter), and defines CSS custom properties for the dark fantasy theme including colors for surfaces, rarity tiers, health bars, and UI elements.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: Core game type definitions and pure utility functions including LocalCharacter interface, stat/XP/level calculations, HP formulas, ability point thresholds, and class stat bonuses.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers for maintaining values like admin tokens across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with CSS variable-based colors, custom fonts (Inter, Cinzel), border radii, and animations for the dark fantasy UI.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file listing known bugs (stat points not reflecting in Character tab, abilities grayed out at level 1) and pending feature requests including class display on the character select screen.
